positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a cosmic celestial map, featuring abstract constellations forming recognizable woodland animals (like a majestic deer, a sleeping bear, and a flying raven). The main palette is deep indigo blue, cosmic violet, metallic gold, and luminous emerald green. The art style should be highly detailed and graphic, resembling mid-century modern celestial cartography meets bioluminescent forest folklore. Use crisp linework, strong silhouette contrast against a dark background, and subtle gradient glows emanating from the constellation lines. The composition must be balanced and suitable for a central chest print on apparel. Perfect for screen printing, vector art quality.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, realistic photo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grain, low quality, distorted, smudge
